content:
I built a Claude Code workflow that turns one content piece into a 13-platform distribution system through Zernio.

Drop the skill folder into .claude/skills/, write a manifest, and ship.

No config files. No glue code. No auto-publish — you approve every post.

Repo + walkthrough: https://github.com/your-username/zernio-library-skills

youtube.title: My Claude Code Workflow for 13 Social Platforms
youtube.firstComment:
What would you ship first with this?

Drop the use case below — I'll respond to every one.

Free template: https://github.com/your-username/zernio-library-skills

linkedin.customContent:
Three sentences I keep coming back to:

Posting everywhere is not the hard part anymore.
Building the system once is.
The rest is just running the system.

Walkthrough + free template in the comments.
